---
title: "测试2视频外链"
description: |
  Bilibili embed test (test_video_link).
date: 2026-06-05
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## test_video_link

This post embeds a Bilibili video as an external link test (`test_video_link`).

Source: [EasyVtuberStudio on Bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV19W7C64EcK/)

### Large embed (960px)

```{=html}
<div class="video-embed video-embed--large">
  <iframe
    src="https://player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV19W7C64EcK&autoplay=0&danmaku=0&as_wide=1&high_quality=1"
    scrolling="no"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    title="EasyVtuberStudio Bilibili video (large)"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```

### Medium embed A (640px)

Standard player controls: play / pause, progress bar, and volume. Autoplay off.

```{=html}
<div class="video-embed video-embed--medium">
  <iframe
    src="https://player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV19W7C64EcK&autoplay=0&danmaku=0&as_wide=1&high_quality=1"
    scrolling="no"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    title="EasyVtuberStudio Bilibili video (medium A)"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```

### Medium embed B (640px)

Second medium embed with the same controls and autoplay off.

```{=html}
<div class="video-embed video-embed--medium">
  <iframe
    src="https://player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV19W7C64EcK&autoplay=0&danmaku=0&as_wide=1&high_quality=1"
    scrolling="no"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    title="EasyVtuberStudio Bilibili video (medium B)"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```
